title: Rhoon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rhoon''' was a group of three [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to carry [[Brigia Rebel base|base]] equipment during the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuation]] of [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] in [[Operation Strike Fear]]. However, all three were destroyed by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], which arrived during the operation.

==Behind the scenes==
In the video game [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], it is possible to save the transports. The player must give them the order to return home (Press Shift-H after targeting each transport) at the very beginning of the mission to guarantee their survival.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
